content: TASK-061 checkpoint done: Diagram tag minimize/maximize controls are now one toggle button instead of separate expand/minimize buttons. The shared createDiagramTags() control exposes a toggleSize action with a clearer panel/chevron icon and dynamic title: Minimize tags when open, Expand tags when minimized. Playground, static demo, and <archmap-viewer controls> all use the shared single-button action. Verification: npm run build, npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts, and browser smoke on http://localhost:5173/ confirmed one toggleSize action, group visibility toggles, dynamic title changes, and no console errors. TASK-056 performance remains open; next optimization target is layout/render recomputation and dense edge path costs.
